description.en: Pandemonium described perception as a layered competition among simple feature detectors and higher-level pattern recognizers. Its noisy, distributed voting metaphor anticipated later ideas in ensemble recognition, blackboard-style systems, and layered pattern processing.
description.zh: Pandemonium 把感知描述为简单特征检测器与高层模式识别器之间的分层竞争。它用带噪声的分布式投票隐喻，预示了后来的集成识别、黑板式系统和分层模式处理思想。

html.en: Early AI needed models for pattern recognition that were less brittle than hand-coded one-shot templates.
html.zh: 早期 AI 需要比一次性手写模板更不脆弱的模式识别模型。

html.en: Multiple small recognizers respond to features; stronger responses propagate upward until a winning interpretation emerges.
html.zh: 多个小型识别器响应特征；较强响应向上传播，直到形成获胜解释。

html.en: Experts generally treat Pandemonium as an influential early model of distributed pattern recognition. Its long-term legacy is the idea of perception as evidence accumulation across layered detectors, which echoes in ensemble methods and hierarchical recognition systems.
html.zh: 专家通常把 Pandemonium 视为有影响力的早期分布式模式识别模型。它的长期影响在于把感知理解为分层检测器之间的证据累积，这一思想在集成方法和分层识别系统中仍有回响。

material.zh: 1959 年 Mechanisation of Thought Processes 论文

demo.en: Aggregate feature votes into a pattern decision
demo.zh: 把特征投票聚合成模式决策

text.en: Small recognizers fire for local evidence.
text.zh: 小型识别器针对局部证据激活。

text.en: Higher-level hypotheses compete using lower-level signals.
text.zh: 高层假设利用低层信号竞争。

text.en: Recognition emerges from many partial votes.
text.zh: 识别来自许多局部投票的汇聚。

description.en: Primary paper for Selfridge's layered demon architecture and feature-vote recognition metaphor.
description.zh: 主要论文： 塞尔弗里奇的分层“魔鬼”架构与特征投票识别隐喻。

license.en: Reference link only; verify source rights before reuse.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；复用前需核验来源权利。

label.zh: 奥利弗·塞尔弗里奇 人物照片
奥利弗·塞尔弗里奇 讣告，卫报
